title: Cheesy Flaky Tarts
description: A simple yet elegant dessert featuring flaky pastry crusts filled with a rich cheese curd mixture.
instructions: 2. Roll out the pastry dough to 1/4 inch thickness.
3. Cut out circles of pastry dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
4. Place the dough circles into a muffin tin, pressing them into the corners and edges.
5. In a bowl, mix together the cheese curds, confectioners' sugar, vanilla extract, and lemon zest (if using).
6. Fill each pastry shell with the cheese curd mixture, dividing it evenly among the tarts.
7. Bake the tarts for 20-25 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown and the filling is set.
8. Allow the tarts to cool in the pan for 5 minutes, then transfer them to a wire rack to cool completely.
